styles.body: font-poppins text-base leading-relaxed bg-gradient-to-br from-[#020617] via-[#7C2D12] to-[#451A03] text-[#FFEDD5]
styles.h1: text-5xl bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FB7185] to-[#FCD34D] text-transparent bg-clip-text mb-10
styles.select: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-slate-300 rounded-md text-[#fff] bg-[#451A03]/80
styles.checkbox: relative w-6 h-6 bg-[#451A03] border-[#FB7185] border-2 peer-checked:bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FB7185] to-[#F59E0B]
styles.input: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#9A3412] rounded-lg bg-[#451A03]/80 text-[#FFEDD5] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FB7185] focus:border-[#FB7185] backdrop-blur
styles.textarea: w-full px-4 py-2 border border-[#9A3412] rounded-lg bg-[#451A03]/80 text-[#FFEDD5] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FB7185] focus:border-[#FB7185] backdrop-blur
styles.button: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FB7185] to-[#F59E0B] text-[#451A03] px-4 py-2 rounded
